title: citrus macroptera var. boholensis
intro: Citrus macroptera var. boholensis, also known as the Bohol citrus or Filipino orange, is a variety of citrus plant native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Citrus macroptera var. boholensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, among others. Its essential oils can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
